prompt: An autonomous maintenance rover patrols an underground facility inspecting power panels, pipes, and sensors. It must finish inspection of a zone before moving to the next. If gas concentration exceeds 3%, the rover immediately activates ventilation mode and halts movement until the level drops below 1%. If battery drops below 25%, it must head to the nearest charging dock. The rover records every anomaly before proceeding, and all inspection reports must eventually be uploaded to the central server.
constraints: MaintenanceRover completes zone inspection before moving to the next
MaintenanceRover halts and activates ventilation when gas concentration > 3%
MaintenanceRover heads to charging when battery < 25%
MaintenanceRover records every anomaly before proceeding
